Verified Reviews

Get a Free Estimate

What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
S
Sarah M.

Alpha Landscape & Design did an amazing job with our new patio! Mark helped us design the perfect space for our backyard in Tremont, and the crew was professional and efficient. The pavers look fantastic, and we've already had several barbecues. Highly recommend!

D
David K.

Our driveway had some pretty significant cracks from the Cleveland winters. Alpha Landscape & Design came out and repaired them quickly and affordably. It looks so much better now! Good, solid work.

E
Emily R.

We needed a retaining wall built in our backyard to prevent erosion. Alpha Landscape & Design provided a great solution and built a beautiful and sturdy wall that blends perfectly with our landscaping. Very happy with the results!

J
John S.

We had Alpha Landscape & Design install an outdoor kitchen, and it's been a game-changer! We love spending time outdoors now, grilling and entertaining. The quality of the work is excellent, and the design is perfect for our needs.

Additional Hardscaping Contractor Services

Patio Design & Installation Driveway Installation & Repair Retaining Wall Construction Outdoor Kitchens & Fireplaces

Alpha Landscape & Design — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every hardscaping contractor project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Alpha Landscape & Design Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific hardscaping contractor needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Cleveland & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Cleveland, OH and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Cleveland Lakewood Parma Rocky River Westlake Avon Bay Village Strongsville
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our hardscaping contractor services.

How long does patio installation take?

The timeline depends on the size and complexity of the project, but we provide a detailed schedule during the consultation phase.

What materials are best for Cleveland patios?

Pavers and natural stone are popular choices due to their durability and resistance to freeze-thaw cycles. We can recommend specific options based on your needs.

Do I need a permit for patio installation?

Permit requirements vary depending on the location and size of the patio. We can assist you with the permit application process.

Built on Cleveland Values

Contact Alpha Landscape & Design today for a free consultation and estimate.

Let's Begin →
